projectDescription: A personalized March Madness bracket tracker that displays your matchups with live scores, spreads, and game details, synced automatically via AI agent cron jobs.
keyFeatures: Personalized matchup cards showing your teams vs. opponents with seed, score, and spread
Real-time score and spread sync via Codex AI agent cron jobs
Automatic deployment via Vercel on every data update
CSV-to-matchup ETL powered by Claude AI for initial data extraction
Mobile-optimized single-page layout with per-game metadata (network, tip time, region)
publicApiSurface: Matchup interface: { myTeam, mySeed, myScore, theirTeam, theirSeed, theirScore, spread, role, tipTime, network, date, region, opponent }
MatchupCard component: renders a single matchup with all game details
role field: 'dog' | 'fav' | 'tbd' — determines card accent color and badge
matchups array in app/page.tsx — single source of truth for all game data
